'''Sikurd''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Sikurd system/Legends|Sikurd system]] within the [[Tynquay sector/Legends|Tynquay sector]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]], and it was the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the [[Sikurdian/Legends|Sikurdian]] species. It was also where [[Sikurdian battle-axe]]s were made.

{{Planet-stub}}
